title: tockBusiness
description: tockBusiness schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier for the business. Used internally by Tock.

name.description: The name given to the business in the Tock Dashboard.

domainName.description: The unique section of exploretock.com that is devoted to showing inventory and allowing guests to book reservations. The top-level URL will be of the form https://exploretock.com/{domainName}/.

locale.description: The locale that the business presents in using the ISO-3166 country code and ISO-639 language code (e.g. en-us for US English, es-es for Spain Spanish).

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 three letter currency code that the business presents on exploretock.coms (e.g. "USD" for US Dollar, "GBP" for Great Britain Pound).

timeZone.description: The time zone in which the business operates in the IANA named format (e.g. "America/Chicago").
